"[26] [Appended, 15:26:12] [2] A user is requesting emergency services from an Apple device via satellite. Transmit and receive times may be longer than for cellular SMS. User responses may be delayed due to satellite movements. The user CANNOT MAKE OR RECEIVE A VOICE CALL because they are outside cellular coverage. At 10:54PM UTC, A USER requested emergency services near these coordinates: Latitude 40.6365 (N), Longitude -122.7439 (W). The user is NOT AT THE LOCATION of the emergency. 2 mins The user requests help at the INCIDENT LOCATION described as: Responders may need to search an area extending at least 20 meters in all directions for a 95% chance of finding the user. The user's estimated altitude (HAE) is 925 meters. Responders may need to search 30 meters above and below this level for a 95% chance of finding the user. Enhanced Emergency Data may be available. QUERY ADDITIONAL DATA! The user's device battery state is 61-100%. Their verified phone number is +15307398738. 2 mins The user requests help with a CAR OR VEHICLE ISSUE emergency. This request is for SOMEONE ELSE. The specific emergency is VEHICLE CRASH. SOMEONE is trapped. The user's iPhone has its region set to UNITED STATES. The user's iPhone has its default language set to ENGLISH. PSAP systems may not render emojis/special characters correctly. Return messages will not be affected. Two-way text with the user is now available. 2 mins This Emergency SOS via satellite session was transferred to the Emergency Relay Center because no PSAP response was received. You may receive or have received a relay voice call for an incident with this same location data. Please verify that your TCC connection and text handling systems are functioning normally, and that dispatchers are logged in to receive texts to avoid relay fallback for future Emergency SOS via satellite sessions. To reach the Emergency Relay Center call 620-317-0404 or toll-free 855-251-2181. 2 mins SYSTEM: We received your 9-1-1 text message. You can wait for the next available call taker or you can CALL 9-1-1. 2 mins (530) 739-8738 Jeremi Myers has joined the chat THIS IS 911 Now Jeremi Myers SYSTEM: Delivery Status: Failed to deliver message to the SMSC, System stopping further retries. Now (530) 739-8738 IS THIS ON BUCKHORN SUMMIT Now Jeremi Myers SYSTEM: Delivery Status: Failed to deliver message to the SMSC, System stopping further retries. Now"
